name: bigintersmind
description: Claude Code workflow skills for shaping work before it hits an editor: spec → prd → issues → triage, with diagnose and tdd companions. Lands tickets in a state where an AFK loop can pick them up.

plugins.name: spec-to-ship
plugins.description: Pre-code workflow that walks a fuzzy idea through alignment (spec), PRD, and tracer-bullet issues (issues, triage) — landing tickets in a state where an AFK loop can pick them up. Includes diagnose and tdd companion skills.
